__description: Crisis signal mock data: negative reviews (rating ≤ 3), RiskManager tasks, and risk chat logs. Loaded by seed_crisis_demo() in seed_demo.py. Add one entry per type to give Crisis Center signal data on a fresh install.

review_logs.rating: <int: 1–3 — must be ≤ 3 to appear as a crisis signal>
review_logs.ai_insight: <string: short insight label — used in Crisis Center card display>
review_logs.hours_ago: <int: 1–72 — how many hours before seed time this review was posted>

coordination_tasks.target_agent: <string: 'RiskManager' — this is what crisis-overview filters on>
coordination_tasks.instruction: <string: actionable task description for the human risk manager>

chat_logs.customer_q: <string: customer message with a complaint or concern>
chat_logs.insight: <string: must contain a risk keyword (lỗi/hỏng/kém/khiếu nại/trả hàng/hoàn tiền/bức xúc) to be picked up by crisis-overview>
